items.name: AI system register
items.description: Record of AI purpose, owner, and governance status.

items.name: Risk assessment
items.description: Documented AI risk assessment and classification.

items.name: Vendor review
items.description: Review evidence for third-party AI vendors.

items.name: Human oversight record
items.description: Evidence of review/approval actions by humans.

items.name: Testing record
items.description: Evidence of testing and evaluation results.

items.name: Monitoring log
items.description: Logs used to monitor AI outputs and system behavior.

items.name: Incident response plan
items.description: Prepared plan for AI incidents and escalation.

items.name: Agent activity log
items.description: Log of autonomous agent actions and approvals.

items.name: Data governance record
items.description: Evidence of data quality, access, and retention controls.

items.name: Training record
items.description: Evidence of staff training on AI governance procedures.

items.name: Model documentation
items.description: Capabilities, limits, and known failure modes documentation.

items.name: Incident log
items.description: Structured log of incidents and near-miss events.

items.name: Post-incident review
items.description: Root-cause analysis and lessons-learned review evidence.
